---
title: "About Me"
toc: true
---

## My Journey

I was born and raised in **Rome, Italy**, where I developed a strong interest in communication, languages, and understanding how people and businesses interact. Growing up in a multicultural environment shaped my curiosity about the world and led me to pursue a path that combines **analytical thinking** with **marketing strategy**.

Before moving to Dublin, I worked as a **Marketing Consultant** and **Administrative and Sales Consultant**, where I built a solid foundation in business operations, customer relations, and strategic thinking. During this time, I became particularly interested in how **data can influence business decisions**, which motivated me to explore this field further.

I am currently completing my **MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University**, where I have developed practical skills in **Python, SQL, Power BI, and machine learning**. Through my academic projects, I have analysed financial fraud datasets and explored advanced models for sentiment analysis, learning how to turn complex data into clear and actionable insights.

I aim to build a career in **consulting or technology**, combining my analytical skills with my business background to support **data-driven decision making**.

---

## How I Work

::: {.workflow}

::: {.workflow-step}
### 1. Understand  
Identify the business problem, goal, and available data.
:::

::: {.workflow-arrow}
→
:::

::: {.workflow-step}
### 2. Prepare  
Clean, organise, and explore the data.
:::

::: {.workflow-arrow}
→
:::

::: {.workflow-step}
### 3. Analyse  
Use Python, SQL, Power BI, machine learning, or NLP to find insights.
:::

::: {.workflow-arrow}
→
:::

::: {.workflow-step}
### 4. Communicate  
Present results clearly through dashboards, visuals, and explanations.
:::

:::
---

## Languages

::: {.language-grid}

::: {.language-card}
### 🇮🇹 Italian  
Native
:::

::: {.language-card}
### 🇬🇧 English  
Fluent
:::

::: {.language-card}
### 🇧🇩 Bangla  
Native
:::

::: {.language-card}
### 🇮🇳 Hindi  
Conversational
:::

::: {.language-card}
### 🇵🇰 Urdu  
Conversational
:::

:::

---

## Hobbies & Interests

I have a genuine passion for **travel and discovering new cultures**. Having grown up in Italy and now living in Ireland, I have always been drawn to exploring different parts of the world. Every new place teaches me something new about people, traditions, and ways of thinking, which I believe makes me a more well-rounded and empathetic professional.

I also have a strong passion for **makeup as a form of art**. I see it as a creative way to express ideas and enhance natural beauty. This creative side reflects my personality beyond data and analytics — someone who values **creativity, curiosity, and self-expression**.
